reasoning: Gukesh's current official FIDE rating (and Wiki listed rating) for March 2025 is 2787. A 1% increase requires him to reach ~2815 (or ~2822 if the benchmark is 2794). At this stratosphere of chess, gaining 28 points is exceptionally difficult since drawing against 2750-rated players loses points, meaning he would need multiple historic 2900+ performances. Furthermore, the FIDE list only officially updates at the start of each month, meaning for March 23 the rating will almost certainly be unchanged from March 16. For April 15, he is not playing classical chess in March, so the April list will likely also remain stagnant. By June 14, he may only have concluded Norway Chess (which may not even make the June 1 list), giving almost zero time to accumulate 28 points. By September and next March, he will play more events, increasing the long-shot chance that he goes on an unprecedented hot streak to hit 2815+.
